author: Francesco Bernini
description: Render Are.na channels as live, responsive masonry grids inside your notes with a simple code block. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Francesco Bernini
manifest.description: Render Are.na channels as live, responsive masonry grids inside your notes with a simple code block.
manifest.name: Are.na Channels

name: Are.na Channels

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new

First release reviewed for the Obsidian community directory.

### Fixed
- Settings tab no longer sets inline styles; slider tooltips use the built-in inline value display.
- Popout-window compatibility: full-width cleanup and deferred rendering now use the correct document/window.
- Pagination fallback logic for Are.na API v2 responses.

### Changed
- Full width no longer uses `!important`: the plugin widens `--file-line-width` on the tagged view instead.
- Release assets now ship with GitHub artifact attestations (build provenance).
